description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a low profile. The sofa is upholstered in a smooth, solid-colored fabric, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance suitable for urban environments. It has two large, loose back cushions and two seat cushions, all of which are uniform in size and shape. The armrests are present only on the left side and the right side features an extended platform, adding a unique asymmetrical touch. The sofa stands on four slender, exposed legs, likely made of metal, which elevate it slightly above the ground. The overall look is functional yet stylish, making it ideal for public spaces, parks, or modern urban interiors.
description: A modern, minimalist two-seater sofa with smooth upholstery, asymmetrical armrests, and slender metal legs. Features two large seat and back cushions and a unique side platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat and back cushions, left armrest, and right-side platform.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the single armrest and the sofa's slim profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cushions and the exposed metal legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the absence of an armrest and the extended platform.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all uniform in size and shape, arranged side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Single straight armrest on the left side, matching the sofa's height, with a boxy, padded profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, exposed metal legs positioned at the corners, straight and cylindrical in shape, providing a modern look.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight backrest with two large, loose cushions, continuous in height and without tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth fabric with no visible pattern, stitching, or decorative detailing.
